{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Queen
| introduced = tg-03-city-of-light
}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Simon]] is going to work for [[the Queen]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c8">''City of Light'', chapter 8</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|"I’m going to work for the Queen, and I need it."<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c8" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate characters]]
